programmes.show_description: When tech CEO Fahim Saleh is found dismembered in his Manhattan home, lift footage reveals his killer - and a shocking betrayal. S1, Ep3
C.C. Opanowski survived a vicious attack by her ex-boyfriend, Shawn Doyle, a man she once trusted. Doyle pleaded guilty to menacing in the second degree. S37, Ep29
The murder of Ivy League student Blaze Bernstein, allegedly murdered because he was gay and Jewish, and the trial of former high school classmate Sam Woodward. S37, Ep1
Law enforcement officials try to get a convicted serial killer to reveal where he left the body of Sara Anne Wood, a 12-year-old girl he murdered 30 years ago. S37, Ep2
Lonnie Franklin Jr, dubbed the 'Southside Slayer' was believed to be responsible for stabbing and strangling at least 13 sex workers between 1983 and 1985. S1, Ep8
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep96
Florida, 1995, an elderly lady and her carer are murdered in a shocking home invasion. Earl Linebaugh and Melissa Harris are found guilty and sentenced to life with no parole. S5, Ep4
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep18/20
A young couple out walking along a pavement are hit by an out of control car, and a young mum calls 999 when her baby is unresponsive. S5, Ep1/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A landlord signals that money is owed by turning his tenant's power on and off; he claims his efforts resulted in $50 placed on his car under a rock. S22, Ep236
The sale of alcohol, a pay to-play talent show and alleged Facebook slander come into play when a dance studio owner is sued. S22, Ep237
When pet owners neglect to neuter their dogs, they end up with a litter of Husky/Pit Bull puppies and a fight over who gets to keep them. S22, Ep238
When a woman asks her roommate the whereabouts of an LP and he says he sold it at a garage sale, all hell breaks loose. S22, Ep239
A woman sues her former friends for slander after they allegedly refuse to return an $800 iPhone. S22, Ep240
A construction worker allegedly takes the law into his own hands by stealing property from his boss after claiming he was not paid. S24, Ep69
A Pit Bull interrupts a woman's evening stroll by scaling a six-foot privacy fence and attacking her; she fights back with mace, until it runs out. S24, Ep70
A limo company owner accuses his ex-driver of being negligent after his $200,000 vehicle is damaged; the ex-employee says his driving record is impeccable. S20, Ep3
A woman cries as she dramatically recounts the terror of seeing her Terrier 'Dolly' being viciously attacked by her neighbour's Spanish Bulldog. S20, Ep4
A woman sues her ex-lover for damages caused to a hotel room as a result of his temper tantrum; he claims her jealousy is to blame. S20, Ep5
A woman is relentless in her pursuit of payback for an accidental shrinking of her $50 pants; she denies keying a car over the incident. S20, Ep6
A woman suing for the return of her computer points the finger at her home-schooled niece who, in turn, points the finger at her imprisoned cousin. S20, Ep7
A woman admits that her small dog was off leash and not within her reach when it was attacked and almost killed by a neighbour's larger dog. S20, Ep8
A woman with a protective order against her ex-fiancé says she was too scared to call the police when he hit her vehicle with his car. S20, Ep9
Armed with a bat and a Pit Bull, a woman's stroll around the block ends with an attack by an unleashed dog and alleged ridicule from the pet's owner. S20, Ep10
An assault during a custody exchange at McDonald's takes place after a babysitter serves the mother of her client's children with papers alleging abuse. S20, Ep11
A dog-walking dispute escalates into a full-blown assault when a woman pepper sprays a puppy and its owners; she claims they beat her up in return. S20, Ep12
A woman says a man she met on Tinder kidnapped her during a date then invaded her privacy when he started live streaming the night's events. S24, Ep71
Lovers 'playing house' break Judge Judy's #1 rule and go in together to buy a new vehicle; a 28K balance remains after their break-up. S24, Ep72
Two Pit Bulls allegedly run home with blood on their faces after an attack on a neighbour's dog; their owner puts them down but still denies they were a menace. S24, Ep73
Former Idaho state trooper Dan Howard is charged with murdering his wife three years after her death. S37, Ep3
The investigation into the death of Sarah Harris raises questions about the relationship between a doctor and his much younger girlfriend. S37, Ep4
In 1930, Alfred Rouse murders a drifter in Northamptonshire, and burns the body to fake his own death; but a witness, a wallet and a number plate convict him. S1, Ep5
Hannegret Donnelly secretly abused her husband for years in Buckinghamshire. He was found dead with 78 injuries, exposing the systematic domestic cruelty. S3, Ep10
Sarah Stern had inherited a large sum from her mother, then one day she disappears, and suicide is suspected. S1, Ep3
Explore the dangerous cult of Dwight York, aka Dr. Love. S1, Ep6
Former Idaho state trooper Dan Howard is charged with murdering his wife three years after her death. S37, Ep3
The investigation into the death of Sarah Harris raises questions about the relationship between a doctor and his much younger girlfriend. S37, Ep4
Randy Kraft known as the Scorecard Killer, the Southern California Strangler, and the Freeway Killer, raped, tortured, and murdered a minimum of sixteen young men between 1972 and 1983. S1, Ep9
Cary Stayner is a serial killer who was convicted of the murders of four women in 1999. Stayner was sentenced to death for the four murders. S1, Ep10
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep97
Baby Dylan was three-months-old when his mother, Alexandra Tobias shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of second degree murder. S5, Ep5
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep19/20
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep20/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman sues a man for vet bills after his larger dog allegedly attacked her Yorkie; he claims she is lying about witnessing the attack. S22, Ep206
A young man claims his ex-girlfriend was cheating on him; she says he threatened to post photos of her online. S22, Ep207
A woman claims she paid thousands for sneakers but demands a refund when the shoebox that arrives is allegedly empty. S22, Ep208
A young man's defence for allegedly damaging a teenager's phone with a laser beam is that he's a redneck and that's what he does for fun. S22, Ep209
After drinking half a bottle of vodka, a man is accused of slapping his girlfriend and destroying her belongings; he claims she attacked him. S18, Ep5
A man sues his ex-boyfriend's sister-in-law for falsely accusing him of burglarizing her home. S18, Ep6
A woman accused of being a retaliatory nuisance is arrested by cops despite her confinement to a wheelchair; she denies all charges. S18, Ep7
A convenience store owner is accused of attacking a man with a baseball bat; the man is accused of being a panhandler and a thief. S18, Ep8
A homeless woman gets a master's degree and buys her own home; her mistake is renting to a mother of three who was living in her car. S24, Ep74
A woman waits six days before clarifying that she owned the gun that police found in her apartment and not her roommate, who is an ex-con. S24, Ep75
A man says he provided a home for woman after falling for her sob story, only to be accused of poisoning her dog by feeding him goulash. S24, Ep76
A man hires detectives to find a handyman that he alleges owes him money and vandalized his property. S22, Ep241
A woman neglects to tell her dear friend that the car she is making payments on is about to be repossessed. S22, Ep242
A father hires a woman to care for his child while he is away for business then accuses her of maxing out the credit card he co-signed for her. S22, Ep243
A man's demeanour in court leads the Judge to rule that she wouldn't let him drive a tricycle let alone a car which he is accused of wrecking. S22, Ep244
Unwed parents of a six-year-old girl fight over a tax refund after alleged jail time, job loss and drug possession. S22, Ep245
A woman sues her former friend for profits from a litter of pit bulls and for allegedly making a false arrest. S22, Ep246
Teenagers rumoured to have a history with the police are accused of damaging their own apartment; their mother is sued for repairs. S22, Ep247
A young man insists that he was doing his landlord a favour by ripping out all her kitchen appliances shortly before he moved out. S20, Ep13
A woman claims her nephew shot her in the head with a BB gun; her sister claims she broke in and stole her belongings. S20, Ep14
A woman's violent past comes back to haunt her when she points the harassment finger at a woman she neglected to pay back for an earlier crime. S20, Ep15
After a pizza delivery driver hears a 'thump' while driving, he discovers that a 9-year-old boy accidentally ran into his car while playing in the street. S20, Ep16

programmes.show_name: UK Crime Files: Connecting a Killer
UK Crime Files: Murder: A Fight for Justice

programmes.show_description: A look at the case of teenager Alex Davies, who was murdered by Brian Healless after the pair met on the dating app Grindr. S1, Ep1
Pennie Davis from Hampshire was killed in 2014, after a revived feud led Ben Carr to hire a hitman. S3, Ep1
